final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic concept art matte painting of a Mars colony in 2387, showing a panoramic view of the settlement.

Style/medium: hard sci-fi concept art, photorealistic matte painting, cinematic CGI quality, grounded in realistic engineering aesthetics
Composition: wide panoramic establishing shot, eye-level to slightly elevated viewpoint, sweeping vista capturing multiple domes and the Martian horizon
Subject: massive transparent geodesic domes with lush vegetation and high-rise structures visible inside, foreground team of explorers in advanced EVA suits conducting geological surveys, six-wheeled Mars rovers parked nearby
Scene/backdrop: red Martian desert regolith stretching to horizon, Olympus Mons silhouette in far distance, massive solar array farms and atmosphere processing stations operating outside the domes, 2387 Mars colony infrastructure
Lighting/mood: Mars actual daylight simulation, diffuse sunlight with 40% Earth intensity, long shadows, dusty atmospheric haze, awe-inspiring sense of scale and human achievement
Color palette: ochre red and burnt orange as dominant base, warm amber highlights, cool silver-gray accents on technology, muted teal in vegetation, atmospheric pinkish sky gradient
Materials/textures: dusty regolith with fine particulate texture, transparent polymer dome surfaces with subtle reflections, metallic composite rover bodies, fabric and hard-shell EVA suit materials, dense foliage visible through dome transparency
Avoid: fantasy elements, magical lighting, Earth-blue sky, lush green everywhere, deformed anatomy, watermarks, 8K stuffer text
Constraints: maintain scientific plausibility for 2387 technology level, all structures must suggest functional engineering purpose, scale relationships must feel authentic
